title: Create: Train Perspective
description: Provides more immersion for players on a train.
body:
# Create: Train Perspective
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-der--fruhling%2Fcreate--train--perspective-0a0047)](https://github.com/der-fruhling/create-train-perspective)

_More immersion!_

<details open>
  <summary>The future of this project</summary>

  ~~This mod has been abandoned for quite some time~~

  we're so back
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Important with Create 0.5.1.g and above!</summary>

  Create 0.5.1.g introduced a default option that turns the camera with trains. This mod adds leaning and roll functions, which Create has not (yet) added, but the built-in functionality conflicts with this mod.

  To continue using this mod as normal, disable "Rotate when seated" in Create's client config. Version v1.1.0+ of this mod does this automatically for you, so you don't have to do anything in that case.
</details>

## What is this?

With the normal Create behavior, the player's camera stays in the same direction when the train turns, giving the
appearance that the player themselves are turning. This mod turns the player's camera with the train they're riding to
provide more immersion. This mod also applies "lean" and "roll" to the player when the train is on a slope.

The mod should also work while standing on the train, though this functionality is a bit experimental at the moment (and
horribly unsafe). If you have any issues (with the
mod), [remember to report them!](https://github.com/der-fruhling-entertainment/create-train-perspective/issues)

**Notice:** This mod may cause motion sickness. Just like real trains, but blockier.

This is a client-side only mod. It does nothing on the server and will probably crash if you try to use it on one
anyways, so don't do that!!

## Create 6 compatibility

Only version v1.1.0+ for Minecraft 1.21.1 is compatible with Create 6. The v1.1.1 files for Minecraft 1.20.1 are compatible with _both_ Create 0.5 and Create 6.
